decks.notes: This deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays and explosive combos. It leverages synergies between artifact creatures, efficient mana rocks, and powerful artifact-based spells to create a fast-paced and relentless playstyle. By utilizing cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Urza's Saga, the deck can generate value and maintain pressure while disrupting the opponent's strategy with disruptive spells like Metallic Rebuke. The inclusion of Engineered Explosives and Tormod's Crypt also allows the deck to control the board and disrupt graveyard strategies.

The deck focuses on maintaining a fast and aggressive playstyle by utilizing artifact creatures and other artifacts to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It utilizes cards like Arcbound Ravager and Mishra's Bauble to continually increase its board presence and pressure the opponent. Engineered Explosives and Tormod's Crypt provide additional control options, while cards like Metallic Rebuke and Sink into Stupor help disrupt the opponent's strategy. Urza's Saga and Pinnacle Emissary provide additional ways to generate advantage and push for a quick victory. The deck aims to quickly establish dominance on the battlefield and close out the game before the opponent can respond effectively.

This deck focuses on utilizing the blink mechanic to repeatedly trigger powerful ETB abilities and gain value from creatures entering and leaving the battlefield. By blinking creatures like Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd and White Orchid Phantom, the deck can generate card advantage and disrupt opponents' strategies. The deck also includes disruptive cards like Teferi, Time Raveler to control the board and draw cards with Consign to Memory. With a mix of aggressive creatures and blink synergy, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with value and tempo.

This deck focuses on playing low-cost, aggressive creatures combined with cheap spells to quickly pressure the opponent's life total. By using cards like Dragon's Rage Channeler, Monastery Swiftspear, and Cori-Steel Cutter along with burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently. Mishra's Bauble and Experimental Synthesizer provide card advantage and additional resources to keep the pressure on the opponent. The inclusion of bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and counterspells like Stormchaser's Talent help to disrupt the opponent's game plan while pushing for a fast win.

This deck focuses on assembling the Broodscale Bloodchief combo by using cards like Basking Broodscale and Glaring Fleshraker alongside support cards like Ancient Stirrings and Urza's Saga to find the necessary pieces. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Unholy Heat and Malevolent Rumble to control the board and protect the combo. The strategy involves ramping up mana with Eldrazi Temple and lands like Grove of the Burnwillows to eventually play Emrakul, the Promised End and win the game with the combo.

The deck focuses on aggressive creatures that can be repeatedly blinked or flickered to gain additional value and disrupt the opponent's game plan. By using cards like Flickerwisp and Ephemerate, along with powerful creatures like Overlord of the Balemurk and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats and disruptive plays. The deck also includes removal spells like Fatal Push and Thoughtseize to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The combination of aggression and disruption makes this deck a versatile and powerful option in Modern 1 vs 1 matchups.

The key concept of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo pieces needed for a win condition without relying on traditional lands. By utilizing cards like Tameshi, Reality Architect and Hydroelectric Specimen to generate mana, along with Lotus Bloom for additional resources, the deck aims to use Goblin Charbelcher as its primary win condition. Control elements like Disrupting Shoal, Counterspell, and Force of Negation help protect the combo, while cards like Jwari Disruption and Waterlogged Teachings provide additional utility and card advantage. This landless combo deck focuses on efficiently executing its game plan and disrupting the opponent's strategy.

The main concept of this Aggro-Affinity deck is to quickly develop a board presence using artifact creatures and use cards like Arcbound Ravager and Emry, Lurker of the Loch to generate value. The deck also relies on cards like Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke to control the opponent's board, while utilizing cards like Mishra's Bauble and Mox Opal to maintain card advantage. Urza's Saga is a key card in the deck, providing additional artifact tokens and helping to tutor for important artifacts. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast and efficient plays.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifact creatures and artifacts to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. By combining cards like Arcbound Ravager, Pinnacle Emissary, and Engineered Explosives with powerful artifacts like Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble, the deck can generate strong board presence and apply pressure early on. Additionally, cards like Tormod's Crypt and Metallic Rebuke provide disruption and control elements to handle threats from the opponent. The deck aims to efficiently control the board and close out the game with its aggressive artifact creatures and spells.

The main focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of fast, aggressive creatures and direct burn spells. The deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early in the game with efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, while also using spells like Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm to deal direct damage and maintain board control. The inclusion of cards like Seasoned Pyromancer and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provide additional value and options for the player, making it a versatile and powerful aggro deck.

This deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo involving sacrificing creatures to Basking Broodscale to fuel the Blade of the Bloodchief for massive damage. It also utilizes the Emrakul, the Promised End as a game-ending threat. The deck runs a mix of creature removal, card draw, and ramp to support the combo strategy. Urza's Saga and Ancient Stirrings help search for key pieces, while Kozilek's Command provides flexibility and disruption. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a relentless onslaught of creatures and powerful spells.

This deck focuses on quickly getting powerful creatures onto the battlefield using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Ephemerate. The goal is to combo off and reanimate creatures like Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Griselbrand to overwhelm the opponent. The deck also includes disruption in the form of Thoughtseize and force of Negation to protect the combo. With a mix of card advantage, removal, and powerful reanimation targets, this deck aims to win the game quickly and efficiently through its instant reanimation strategy.

This Jeskai Aggro deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures and burn spells to quickly overwhelm opponents. With a strong mix of creatures like Guide of Souls and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, along with powerful planeswalkers like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah, the deck aims to apply pressure early and keep control of the board. With access to efficient removal spells like Solitude and Galvanic Discharge, as well as versatile cards like Thraben Charm, the deck can adapt to different matchups and maintain an aggressive tempo throughout the game.

This deck focuses on quickly cycling through cards to fill the graveyard with creatures and then casting Living End to return them all to the battlefield for a powerful combo. The deck includes various ways to cycle cards and control the board until it can set up its combo. Key cards like Endurance and Force of Negation help protect the combo and disrupt opponents' strategies. Boseiju, Who Endures can ensure Living End resolves, while Shardless Agent and Oliphaunt provide additional value. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a sudden flurry of creatures while controlling the game state.

This combo-reanimator deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures like Emperor of Bones, Archon of Cruelty, and Abhorrent Oculus, and then bringing them back onto the battlefield using spells like Unearth and Persist. The deck also includes disruption cards like Fatal Push and Thoughtseize to control the opponent's board while setting up its own win condition. By efficiently utilizing these resources, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its powerful creatures and take control of the game.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill up your graveyard with powerful creatures, then use cards like Unearth and Persist to bring them back onto the battlefield for additional value. The deck utilizes a combination of control elements like hand disruption and removal spells to protect your combo pieces while setting up your graveyard. By reanimating big threats like Archon of Cruelty and Emperor of Bones, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and close out the game quickly before they can recover.
